title: hedysarum alpinum subsp. americanum
intro: Hedysarum alpinum subsp. americanum, also known as the American mountain rose or alpine hedysarum, is a plant species within the pea family (Fabaceae) that is native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various gastrointestinal issues, due to its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and potentially acting as a natural antiseptic. Hedysarum alpinum subsp. americanum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural remedy enthusiasts.
